description.default: "Yes" means that a button will appear on the home screen of the app that will trigger the "Update Item Webhook" flow. "No" means the button will not be visible.

label.description: "Yes" means that a button will appear on the home screen of the app that will trigger the "Update Item Webhook" flow. "No" means the button will not be visible.

displayname.default: Show Update Item Webhook in App

label.description: Show Update Item Webhook in App
